name: provana-langfuse
description: Langfuse integration for Provana — prompt migration, tracing patterns, and LLM observability

provana-langfuse-prompts.description: Migrate hardcoded prompts from any Provana service to Langfuse prompt management. Creates Dev + QA versions under the standard naming convention and generates a prompt_service.py fetch helper. Use when user says 'migrate prompts to Langfuse', 'move prompts to Langfuse', or 'create Langfuse prompts for this service'.
